description: Balanced scoring across adaptive capacity buffering transformability governance equity digital resilience climate readiness exposure and burden.
Prioritizes near term adaptive capacity and operating flexibility.
Prioritizes redundancy slack buffers and absorptive capacity.
Prioritizes structural redesign and transition readiness.
Prioritizes legitimacy participation public accountability and distributional resilience.
Prioritizes data cyber physical software and public digital infrastructure resilience.
Prioritizes climate adaptation and climate resilient development.
Penalizes strategies that leave high systemic exposure unresolved.
Penalizes strategies with high implementation burden when capacity is constrained.
